prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A two-column comparison diagram showing the division of responsibility between AI and Human in a shopping workflow. LEFT COLUMN (Blue #6C82FE dominant): Labeled 'DELEGATE to AI'. Three stacked isometric steps flowing downward: (1) A magnifying glass icon with '847→20' label — Multi-Source Search across stores. (2) A funnel/filter icon with '20→8' label — Translation Layer filtering. (3) A ruler icon — Size Verification. (4) A clipboard with checkmark — Stock Check. Each step has clean matte black outlines and Blue faces with White highlights. A small label at bottom: '~25% contribution'. RIGHT COLUMN (Orange #F59400 dominant): Labeled 'OWN by Human'. Four stacked isometric steps: (1) An eye icon with '8→4' label — Visual filtering on train. (2) A pointing hand icon — Final selection (Marcus points at TV). (3) A pound sterling £ icon — Price decision by parents. (4) A warning triangle ⚠️ icon — Escalation choice (accept alternative?). Orange faces with White highlights. Label: '~75% contribution'. CENTER BOUNDARY: A wavy/dashed vertical line separating the two columns. Above the line: 'Boundary shifts over time' label in Pink #FC6978. The wavy line suggests the boundary is dynamic, not fixed. All forms: uniform-weight matte black #111111 outlines. Soft-cell shading. Light Gray #EEEEEE background. Generous spacing between elements.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D photorealism, realistic people, pie charts, bar graphs
